Container.Name: tablo2plex
Container.Overview: Tablo2Plex is an HDHomeRun emulator that proxies live TV streams from your Tablo 4th Gen device to Plex. It allows Plex to discover your Tablo as if it were an HDHomeRun tuner, enabling live TV and DVR functionality.[br][br][b]First Run:[/b] Enter your Tablo username and password below. After the first successful login, credentials are encrypted and stored in the appdata folder as creds.bin. You can then remove your username/password from the container settings if desired.[br][br][b]Plex Setup:[/b] After starting, go to Plex Settings > Live TV & DVR > Set Up. Plex should auto-discover the device, or manually enter http://[YOUR-SERVER-IP]:8181
Container.Requires: Requires a Tablo 4th Gen device on your network and a Tablo account.
Container.Changes: [h4]Version 1.0.10[/h4] - Added error logging improvements - Fixed guide file management - Added OTT channel support
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: tablo plex hdhomerun dvr live tv tuner proxy iptv ota antenna

Config.Name: Web UI / Plex Port
Config.Description: Port the emulator listens on. Plex connects to this port to discover the device and stream live TV.

Config.Name: Appdata / Output
Config.Description: Persistent storage for credentials (creds.bin), channel lineup, guide data, and logs.

Config.Name: Tablo Username
Config.Description: Your Tablo account email/username. Required on first run to generate encrypted credentials. Can be removed after creds.bin is created.

Config.Name: Tablo Password
Config.Description: Your Tablo account password. Required on first run to generate encrypted credentials. Can be removed after creds.bin is created.

Config.Name: Device Name
Config.Description: Name of the emulated HDHomeRun device that appears in Plex.

Config.Name: Device ID
Config.Description: Fake device ID. Change this if you run multiple instances to avoid conflicts.

Config.Name: Include OTT Channels
Config.Description: Include Over-The-Top (streaming) channels in the channel lineup.

Config.Name: Create XML Guide
Config.Description: Generate an XML EPG guide from Tablo data instead of using Plex's built-in guide. More accurate but requires more processing.

Config.Name: Guide Days
Config.Description: Number of days of guide data to cache (1-7). More days = longer update time.

Config.Name: Guide Update Interval (hours)
Config.Description: How often to refresh the XML guide data, in hours.

Config.Name: Lineup Update Interval (days)
Config.Description: How often to re-scan the Tablo for channel lineup changes, in days.

Config.Name: Static IP Address
Config.Description: Set the IP address of tablo2plex statically. Leave blank to auto-detect.

Config.Name: Tablo Device ID
Config.Description: Server ID of a specific Tablo device to use. Only needed if you have multiple Tablo devices on your account.

Config.Name: Include PseudoTV Guide
Config.Description: Merge PseudoTV EPG data into the XML guide. Requires PseudoTV xmltv.xml at /.pseudotv/xmltv.xml

Config.Name: PseudoTV Data
Config.Description: Path to PseudoTV data directory containing xmltv.xml. Only needed if Include PseudoTV Guide is enabled.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Logging verbosity. info=basics, error=info+errors, warn=more detail, debug=everything.

Config.Name: Save Log to File
Config.Description: Save console output to a log file in the output directory.
